subcodes.first_line: O thou branch sprung from the Blessed Tree! May God illumine thy sight with holy effusions sent down from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع المنشعب من السدره المبارکه نور الله بصرک بالفیوضات المقدسه المنزله من
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
